tools.name: revit_cable_tray_elbow_align
tools.description: Creates horizontal and vertical cable tray segments, rotates the vertical segment to align connector coordinate systems, then inserts an elbow fitting.

tools.name: revit_cable_tray_elbow_fitting
tools.description: Creates a multi-segment cable tray run and inserts an elbow fitting between the first horizontal and vertical segments.

tools.name: revit_cable_tray_elbow_rotate
tools.description: Creates two cable tray segments, rotates the second about the shared endpoint, and inserts an elbow fitting.

tools.name: revit_cable_tray_elbow_two_segment
tools.description: Creates two separated cable tray segments and connects them with an elbow fitting.

tools.name: revit_conduit_elbow_fitting
tools.description: Creates two conduit segments and inserts an elbow fitting between their open connectors.

tools.name: revit_create_and_print_sheet_for_element
tools.description: Creates a sheet with right, front, top, and isometric 3D views for a single selected element, exports PDF and JPG, and optionally commits the transaction to save the sheet.

element_id.description: Element to document; when omitted, prompts for interactive pick

save_sheet.description: Whether to commit the transaction and keep the sheet (default prompts user)

output_directory.description: Directory for PDF and image export (default C:/tmp)

title_block_name.description: Title block family symbol name (default 'AIR CRO - Plano DIN A4')

tools.name: revit_create_and_print_sheets_batch
tools.description: Batch-processes selected HVAC fabrication duct parts: for each matching product code, creates a sheet with right, front, top, and isometric views, exports PDF and JPG, then rolls back the transaction so nothing is committed.

element_ids.description: FabricationPart element ids; when omitted, uses pre-selection or interactive pick

product_codes.description: Fabrication product codes to process (defaults to built-in list in Command)

output_directory.description: Directory for PDF and image export (default C:/tmp)

tools.name: revit_create_direct_shape_from_face
tools.description: Creates a Generic Model DirectShape from a picked face with sketch-plane reuse, per-triangle model lines, and geometry-instance transform stack resolution for nested families.

face_reference.description: Stable representation of the face to convert (interactive pick when omitted)

draw_model_lines.description: When true, draw model-line loops for each triangle (always true in the current command)

tools.name: revit_create_direct_shape_from_face_initial
tools.description: Creates a Generic Model DirectShape from a picked element face using the initial tessellated shape builder approach with a LocationPoint offset.

face_reference.description: Stable representation of the face to convert (interactive pick when omitted)

tools.name: revit_export_pipe_system
tools.description: Enumerates all pipes and pipe fittings in the document, logging connector endpoints, diameters, and inferred fitting types (plug, elbow, tee) to debug output.

system_type.description: Optional MEP system type name filter (not yet implemented; exports all pipes and fittings)

tools.name: revit_export_room_svg
tools.description: Exports a room plan boundary to an SVG file scaled to a 100x100 viewBox.

room_id.description: Element id of the room to export

output_path.description: Full path for the output .svg file

tools.name: revit_import_stl
tools.description: Imports an STL file into a Generic Model DirectShape element using TessellatedShapeBuilder and the QuantumConcepts STL reader.

file_path.description: Path to the STL file (OpenFileDialog when omitted)

binary.description: When true, read binary STL; when false, read ASCII STL (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

target.description: TessellatedShapeBuilder target mode (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

graphics_style.description: Optional graphics style for imported mesh (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

tools.name: revit_list_unhosted_mep_elements
tools.description: List MEP family instances that are not hosted to a valid host element.

tools.name: revit_n3p_external_event
tools.description: Modeless dialog that tags selected elements via RevitToolkitEvents from Common.

tools.name: revit_populate_cfm_per_sf
tools.description: Populate the CFM-per-SF parameter on all MEP spaces from actual supply airflow and area.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_data_type_ascii
tools.description: Sets STL file reader to ASCII format.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_data_type_binary
tools.description: Sets STL file reader to binary format.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_mode_any_geometry
tools.description: Sets STL import TessellatedShapeBuilder mode to AnyGeometry with Mesh fallback.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_mode_polymesh
tools.description: Sets STL import TessellatedShapeBuilder mode to Mesh with Salvage fallback.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_mode_solid
tools.description: Sets STL import TessellatedShapeBuilder mode to Solid with Abort fallback.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_style_none
tools.description: Clears the graphics style used when importing STL geometry.

tools.name: revit_stl_import_set_style_sketch
tools.description: Sets STL import graphics style to the document <Sketch> GraphicsStyle when available.

tools.description: Retrieve analytical model geometry

tools.description: Create a direct shape using BrepBuilder and Boolean operation

tools.name: revit_change_element_color
tools.description: Using OverrideGraphicSettings for active view

tools.name: revit_change_linked_file_path
tools.description: Change linked RVT file path

tools.name: revit_compare_element_centroid
tools.description: Compares tessellation-based centroid and volume with Solid.ComputeCentroid and Solid.Volume for each tessellatable solid.

element_ids.description: Element ids to analyze; when omitted, uses the current selection or interactive pick

tools.name: revit_coords_of_view_on_sheet

tools.description: Duplicate a system type from on project to another to partially transfer project standards

tools.name: revit_create_cnc_fab_shared_parameters
tools.description: Create and bind CncFab export-tracking shared parameters (IsExported, ExportedFirst, ExportedLast) to the Parts category.

tools.name: revit_create_direct_shape_from_face_simple
tools.description: Creates a Generic Model DirectShape from a picked element face by triangulating the face and applying the family instance total transform when needed.

tools.name: revit_create_room_cropped_plan_views

room_ids.description: Optional subset of room element ids to process

wall_offset_factor.description: Multiplier applied to wall width when computing outward offset (default uses wall width plus 0.1 ft padding)

view_name_suffix.description: Optional suffix appended to generated view names instead of the default date stamp

tools.name: revit_create_room_volume_direct_shapes

level_id.description: Optional level filter for rooms to process

room_ids.description: Optional subset of room element ids to process

overwrite_existing.description: When true, delete prior DirectShapes whose ApplicationDataId matches a room UniqueId before creating new ones

tools.description: Create shared parameters for Doors, Walls, inserted DWG, Model Groups and Model Lines

tools.description: Export selected wall parts from a 3D parts-only view to individual SAT files for CNC fabrication.
